title: Release of the 2025 Bank of Canada FMI Oversight Activities Annual Report
summary: The Bank of Canada published its 2025 Annual Report on FMI Oversight Activities on March 24, 2026, reviewing oversight of designated clearing and settlement systems. The report states that designated FMIs continued making progress on modernization initiatives and improved risk management practices, addressing previously identified gaps. The Bank outlines ongoing and new expectations for FMIs to enhance risk management practices going forward.
key_points: Bank of Canada published 2025 Annual Report on FMI Oversight Activities on March 24, 2026
Report covers oversight of designated clearing and settlement systems (financial market infrastructures)
Designated FMIs made progress on modernization initiatives during 2025
FMIs improved risk management practices, addressing previously identified gaps
Bank set ongoing and new expectations for FMIs to enhance risk management in 2026 and beyond
why_it_matters: This annual report indicates the Bank of Canada's assessment that Canadian financial market infrastructure operators are generally managing risks adequately, though specific risk concerns or findings are not disclosed in this announcement. The report is primarily informational for stakeholders in the Canadian clearing and settlement ecosystem rather than market-moving.
market_structure_context: The report pertains to oversight of financial market infrastructures (clearing houses and settlement systems), which are core market plumbing components. This is regulatory oversight of critical market infrastructure operators rather than a direct market structure announcement.
